models.description: AI models that power Goose. Expand a provider to review what it needs. Connect signs in with an existing account, while Set up saves API keys or other provider settings.

fieldDescription.cloudCredentials: Set up saves any provider details Goose needs here. Your actual authentication still comes from your cloud credentials.
fieldDescription.configFields: Set up saves the provider details Goose needs, such as an API key, endpoint, or model settings.
fieldDescription.hostWithOauthFallback: Set up saves the host details Goose needs here. You can add a token now, or leave it blank and sign in afterward from Goose.
fieldDescription.singleApiKey: Set up saves the API key Goose needs for this provider.

setup.hostWithOauthFallbackTerminal: Leave Access Token blank, save your host URL, then run `goose configure` in your terminal to sign in.
setup.nativeConnectDescription: Sign in with your existing account.

pending.cloudCredentials: Configure your cloud credentials in your terminal environment before using this provider.
pending.local: This provider runs locally and does not need saved settings here.
pending.oauthGuided: Goose will guide you through sign-in from here.
pending.oauthTerminal: Run `goose configure` in your terminal to finish sign-in.
